title: Lance of Longinus
wikitext:
[]: Lance of Longinus             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat May 31, 2008 5:32 pm Don't really know if it's of any signifigance but... In Rebuild the Lance is already in Lilith from the begining elimitating the need for a trip to the South Pole and Eva-00 stabbing it into Lilith. So I was just wondering if there is any signifigance to this or just one of those over-anaylizing things.

[]: Re: Lance of Longinus             Quote Post by Xard » Sat May 31, 2008 5:36 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Don't really know if it's of any signifigance but... In Rebuild the Lance is already in Lilith from the begining elimitating the need for a trip to the South Pole and Eva-00 stabbing it into Lilith. So I was just wondering if there is any signifigance to this or just one of those over-anaylizing things.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat May 31, 2008 8:07 pm I think I'd have to agree with Xard. With the trip to Antarctica gone, I think we could say that Sahaquiel could be gone from Rebuild 2.0 b/c this battle took place during that trip.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 31, 2008 8:31 pm Sahaquiel probably will be gone (HURR HURR PH34R MY ANGEL TURDS) , but think about it. The trip to Antarctica was stupid anyway. In all practicality, they should have just picked up the Spear when they went down there to get Adam, instead of putting it off 15 years for no apparent reason. (Unless you want to fanwank something, but, if so, bump a thread in the Discussion Forest for it...) And for the record I wouldn't put any major significance into the timing of the Spear's pickup in NGE. They did it in episode 12, when Sahaquiel attacked, because they stepped up Misato's character development in that episode and showed the 2I flashback. Hence, it was also a opportune time to show what Antarctica looked like in the present day and have Fuyu and Gendo say cryptic things about it.
